DREAM OF LEGACY CONSULTING – Dream of Legacy Consulting partners with entrepreneurs and creators to deliver Fractional CFO and Strategic Consulting Services that create clarity, develop strategy that drives sustainable growth. We provide financial insight and strategic insight that empower leaders to make confident, data-driven decisions. Tagline: We enable entrepreneurs and creators to increase profits and turn revenue into financial security and generational wealth.Site layout: Branding & ColorsPrimary background color: Navy #0B1A2B (applied across the full site background).Accent color (headlines, buttons): Gold #C9A24B.Text: White (#FFFFFF) for body and section copy.Logo: Gold tree with “Dream of Legacy Consulting” text — appears top center and in footer.2. Homepage LayoutTop Navigation (sticky, white text):Sections: About UsOur ApproachOur ServicesWhy Fractional CFOElevate Your Wealth (Blog)Schedule a Consultation (button → Calendly link)Hero Section:Headline: Fractional CFO and Strategic Consulting Services (in bright gold, large, centered).Sub-tagline (white, justified):We provide business leaders with the clarity, confidence, and strategic insight needed to make sound financial decisions while scaling. Through Fractional CFO and Consulting Services, we ensure growth is sustainable—grounded in data, strategy, and financial integrity.CTA button (gold background, navy text): “Schedule a Consultation.”3. Services Section (grid 2×2)Core Financial Leadership & ReviewExecutive oversight, monthly reviews, KPI rhythm, actionable insights.Strategic Planning & ForecastingForecasts, budgets, KPI tracking, scenario planning.Other Strategic Advisory ServicesInternal controls, process improvement, pricing optimization, risk reporting.VIP Intensive DayOne-day deep dive with audit, alignment, and 90-day roadmap.Each service block includes:An image (specific as you directed earlier).Title (clickable, white).Short justified description (white).“Learn More” button (link to detail page).4. Values Section (grid 3×2)IntegrityExcellenceStewardshipWisdomCompassionPartnershipEach value has:Icon (non-person image).White title.White one-line description.5. FooterNavy background.Left: Logo (clicks back to homepage).Middle: Quick links (About, Our Approach, Why Fractional CFO, Blog).Services list (clickable).Right: Connect section with LinkedIn, Instagram, and “Schedule a Consultation.”NAICS code at the bottom (541611 — Admin & General Management Consulting).6. Fixes / IssuesOld WordPress widgets (“About me,” “Blog at WordPress,” Twitter/Facebook links, repeated logos) → remove via Appearance → Widgets.Title visibility: Use gold + text shadow overlay to make “Fractional CFO and Strategic Consulting Services” fully legible.Ensure top navigation fits one row (adjust spacing or font size).Remove duplicate logos in footer.7. SEO / FunnelSEO focus: On-page + Local SEO (keywords, structured headings, meta tags).Every service page: description + CTA → Calendly.Blog: “Elevate Your Wealth” category. Content optimized around finance keywords.Lead funnel: Name + email captured before Calendly booking.
